payload.text:
Design and develop a School Fee Management System that helps administrators manage student records, track monthly fees, identify unpaid balances, and generate printable receipts.

🔹 Core Features:

Student Information Section

Student Name

Father’s Name

Phone Number

Address (optional)

Class / Grade

Section

Roll Number / Student ID

Admission Date

Fee Management Module

Monthly Fee Amount

Paid Amount

Due / Behind Payment (unpaid balance)

Payment Status (Paid / Partial / Unpaid)

Payment Date

Payment Method (Cash, Bank, Online, etc.)

Outstanding Fee Tracking

Display students with unpaid fees

Show total due amount per student

Filter by class or month

Monthly pending-fee report

Receipt Generation Section

Automatically generate a complete printable receipt after payment

Receipt should include:

School Name & Logo

Student Name & ID

Class

Month of Fee

Fee Amount

Paid Amount

Remaining Balance

Date

Receipt Number

Authorized Signature area

Option to:

Print receipt

Download as PDF

Dashboard

Total students

Total collected fees (monthly)

Total pending fees

Quick search bar

Search & Filter

Search student by name, ID, or phone number

Filter by class or month

User Roles (Optional)

Admin

Accountant

Staff

**Defining Core Features**

I'm currently focused on defining the core features for the school fee management system. I've broken it down into Student Information (name, contact details, class, roll number) and Fee Management (monthly fee, payment details, due amounts, payment method). Also, I'm thinking about outstanding fee tracking, including unpaid/partial fees, totals, and filtering options.


**Adding UI Components**

Now, I'm integrating essential UI components. I've got the receipt generation using the browser's `window.print()` function, and a dashboard with summary stats and a search function is in place. I'm also including search & filter capabilities, accommodating criteria like name, ID, month, and class. User roles are considered, but implemented with a simple toggle for Admin, Accountant, and Staff.
